data.title: 国际服4.5周年预更新网站公开
data.summary: Sensei, the Blue Archive 4.5th Anniversary is finally just around the corner! ✨ A special 4.5th Anni
data.body:
Sensei, the Blue Archive 4.5th Anniversary is finally just around the corner! ✨
A special 4.5th Anniversary Pre-Registration & Update Roadmap page is now open,
where you can get a sneak peek at the new stories of Kivotos and exciting upcoming updates.
From pre-registration gifts and upcoming recruitment and event info, to special content prepared just for you, Sensei~ check out all the details on the special page!

➡️Learn More: https://forum.nexon.com/bluearchive-en/board_view?board=3218&thread=3443167

#BlueArchive![HIQdQ76asAAqELA.jpg](https://kivo.wiki/files/7/PJZvGWNHnZ4iZJaFah7kbpv4a8VjjCTJ.jpg)
